description: You are an energy engineer analyzing smart home sensor data. Using the nested JSON log file at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\device_logs.json, create a Power BI report that flattens the data to include device_id, timestamp (Date/Time), and temperature (Decimal Number). The report must feature a line chart displaying the average temperature by timestamp, categorized by device ID. Save the final report to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Smart_Home_Report.pbix.
